questions.question: What are two main advantages of using virtual clusters over physical clusters? (2 marks)
expectedPoints: Improved resource utilization through multi-tenancy and oversubscription.
Dynamic provisioning and elasticity, allowing for rapid scaling up/down based on demand.

questions.question: Explain the process of live migration and discuss its significance in resource management for virtualized data centers. (5 marks)
expectedPoints: Description of the pre-copy phase (iterative memory copy).
Description of the stop-and-copy phase (brief pause, copy final state).
Description of the switchover phase (resume on target host).
Significance for proactive maintenance (evacuating hosts for upkeep).
Significance for load balancing (moving VMs from overloaded hosts).
